Amir Sharif

Hi! My name is Amir.

I currently work at Insight Venture Partners.

I've also spent time at the Boston Consulting Group in New York, Yaletown Venture Partners in Vancouver and the non-profit foundation of the Virgin Group in London.

I graduated with a BA from Yale in 2012.

If you want to get in touch, send me an email.
